content: I sighed, feeling really out of place in this uniform.
The Pandoramart, the Hope at the End of the Gas Station. God, it's cringe, it's so cringe I can feel the cringe. And I'm not suppose to be able to feel anything.

label: Nyarla
content: Alright Rue! First Day at the job, are you excited?
My manager is a... He call himself squid person. With all the tentacles and bubbly laid back personality.
But I wasn't born yesterday, I know an eldritch when I see one.

label: Rue
content: Uhhh... Yeah?

label: Nyarla
content: Great! Now then here's how you use your convenience store stuff...

label: Rue
content: Convenience store stuff? Do you actually know how any of this works?
The manager pouted, like actually pouted.

label: Nyarla
content: Myoooo~ What kind of question is that? Ahem, anyway, the most important thing is to be nice to customer.

label: Rue
content: Like, polite?

label: Nyarla
content: You're a natural!

label: Rue
content: So.. That's it? I walk in and suddenly I'm on payroll?

label: Nyarla
content: Oh right the uhhh... The thing, the...

label: Rue
content: Job Interview

label: Nyarla
content: Exactly! That! Ahem, anyway...
A tentacle suddenly appear carrying clipboard and paper.

label: Nyarla
content: So tell me about yourself
*flashbacks*

label: Rue
content: I was a Blood Slave Unit in the 4th Rapture.

label: Nyarla
content: Oh, Rapture, yes, yes, that brings back memories. When was that again? Last week?

label: Rue
content: 400 years ago... Look, sir, drop the act you're not fooling anyone.
The squid in front of me flinched as if struck.

label: Nyarla
content: What? No! I'm not... Ahem, let's focus on you instead of my background. Any criminal background I should know of?

label: Rue
content: Well, I killed, a lot

label: Nyarla
content: Ah yes, murder, but it's war, so nothing wrong with that. You're all green, you passed the interview!
I blinked, slowly is this... Thing for real?

label: Rue
content: I chucked a baby out of window

label: Nyarla
content: You what?

label: Rue
content: I killed an entire family, then throw the baby out of a five stories window and never looked back.

label: Nyarla
content: Well this is a long time ago so...

label: Rue
content: 20 years ago
The squid paused, contemplating it.

label: Nyarla
content: In a sense, you did the baby a favor.
What?

label: Nyarla
content: Nyahaha~ think about it, the baby had no sin right? If you let the baby live they might grow up and do sin and go to hell.

label: Rue
content: What the fuck...
The man wiggled a finger in front of me.

label: Nyarla
content: But since you offed the baby, it gets a guaranteed ticket to heaven! Maybe even with their family that your killed! In a sense you have spared the baby from eternal damnation and granted the baby eternal bliss of heaven.
That... That's... hmmm...

label: Nyarla
content: Anyway, let's get to the floor, your shift is starting.
*starting card, music, etc*

label: Nyarla
content: Welcome to Pandoramart! The hope at the end of the gas station!
The customer barely noticed the friendly squid person waving their hands and tentacles, and simply skittered down the aisle looking for something.

label: Nyarla
content: Alright Rue, now you try.

label: Rue
content: Why? Why are we greeting them?

label: Nyarla
content: To make them feel welcomed!

label: Rue
content: They don't give a shit...

label: Nyarla
content: Aww, come on... Just try! Pretty please? Just wanna trying to lighten things up before I put you on the payroll.
The squid manager retreated behind the counter and start fiddling with his phone, his other tentacles busy restocking the shelves behind me.

label: Customer
content: I'll have these...
A soft voice called my attention, it's an arachne, she's wearing a simple school uniform, her many eyes blinked at me, framed with white hair.
I scanned a toothbrush, some grub crispies, and one of of those playing card thing.

label: Rue
content: That'll be 470 blips, cash or credit?
The customer fished out her phone.

label: Customer
content: Do you support E-Wallet?
I grabbed the edc machine and completed the transaction.

label: Customer
content: Thank you

label: Rue
content: You're Welcome
As the customer skittered out, the door slammed open. An elf stepped in, looking pissed. Angry. And impatient.

label: Rue
content: Welcome to Pandoramart how may I-
A piece of bread landed on my face. It's dry and it flopped on to the counter after gravity took over.

label: Karen
content: You sold me this disgusting abomination of all things pure and sacred!
I grabbed the bread and gazed down at it. Contemplating first degree murder.

label: Rue
content: The bread?

label: Karen
content: THAT is not a bread.... That thing was grown in a box, sprayed with chemicals, ground up and liquified in poison, and painted white to make it look like bread!
I wonder if there's any difference between human and elf once I tear their ears apart...

label: Rue
content: Ma'am...

label: Karen
content: GOD HAD NO HAND IN THE CREATION OF THIS ABHORRENCE! THE FACT THAT THIS DISGUSTING-
Buddha jesus khrisna allah yahweh satan lucifer give me strength...

label: Karen
content: FOR DAYS I LEFT THIS BREAD IN-

label: Nyarla
content: Ahem...
A soft but authoritative voice appeared next to me. He sound different now, a bit more calmer? Guess he can be serious for once...

label: Nyarla
content: I'm the manager, you said you were looking for me?

label: Karen
content: Yes! It's about the quality of the product sold in your-

label: Nyarla
content: Gas Station convenience store yes...
The manager's smile didn't waver as he stepped closer to the woman.

label: Nyarla
content: Let's talk somewhere else more comfortable, there's a room upstairs.
I watched as the manager led the woman upstairs
Wait... Wait, what the hell? Since when is there a second floor? Since when is that marble staircase here? Wait...
I couldn't hear anything for a moment there, and when I tried to walk up to the staircase, an invisible... something stopped me on my tracks.
He's definitely eldritch...
After waiting for a while the two returned.
The elven woman is no longer scowling. In fact she's beaming, as if her outburst never really happened in the first place.

label: Karen
content: to the nexus point!

label: Nyarla
content: Indeed! Now you get it!

label: Karen
content: Oh gosh, you... Uhhh...
The woman  walked up towards me and squinted at my nametag. I took a step back, just a tiny bit confused / startled.

label: Karen
content: Miss Rue! I'm so, so sorry about my outburst...
Somehow, I'm still not satisfied...

label: Rue
content: yeah it's fine, used to it, would you like your bread back?

label: Karen
content: Oh definitely! Thank you! I'll definitely return here if I have a chance.
I watched as the woman left...

label: Nyarla
content: Is that what you want?

label: Rue
content: What?

label: Nyarla
content: You apologized, so I assume you wanted her to respond in kind. If that's not what you want, well, you can try again.

label: Rue
content: huh?
The manager smiled.

label: Nyarla
content: I have other things to take care of, give me a holler if you need anything, see ya~

After a long day of work, it's finally 4 AM and i can finally clock out. The sun isn't up yet, but fuck me I'm already tired. Not that the sun bothers me, it's just annoying. The whole spiel about Vampires burning in daylight doesn't apply much anymore after the Vampire Billionaire Diva, Merilia Azure revolutionize the Sunscreen Industry.

label: Nyarla
content: Alright, thanks for today Rue!

label: Rue
content: Do you clock out manager?

label: Nyarla
content: Hm? Oh no, I live here, anyway, not bad for first day, here...
A tentacle handed me a wad of cash.

label: Rue
content: What's this?

label: Nyarla
content: A first day package, it's not part of your salary, but like... Since you won't be paid until the end of this month, I figure you'll need something to get by on your first month~

label: Rue
content: Oh, uhh... thanks...

I walked down the dark streets outside of the gas station. I can see some cars parked around, there's always more cars than the amount of people that is actually here. Not to mention the gas station itself.
There's the traditional gas station, the electric charging station, but there's also... a stable? A large box with fresh wheat in it?
I decided not to question anything and walked on to my motorbike.
An old model, but one of the best in its prime. The rev of the engine doesn't send a thrill, it sends comfort, a rumbling purr that's just... ah fuck me, I'm finally home.

label: Rue
content: Well then, time to go back...

I rode down the city on my motorbike. The city skyline of Avarath looms ahead of you. The glistening lights, the massive dragons carrying billboards and advertisements. Magic swam in the air showing off ads of heaven, hell, and everything in between.
Oh fuck red light. I squeezed and stop the bike. Just barely as a flash of  traffic light snaps a photo at me. I flipped it off, knowing full well that I won't even appear on the camera.
It was then that I heard something.
???: Get off me!

I turned my head to a nearby alleyway. I see it then, a young girl, surrounded by rough looking people. A few demi human and a human. Well, don't matter their race is, they're harassing this girl now.
I watched as a troll-like (or actual troll) surrounded the girl. His friends laughed cruelly.
4 AM is basically dead hour anyway... They don't expect anyone especially not the angels to show up at this time of day.
I decided to handle this...
I parked my bike near the sidewalk and walked up towards them. Let's do a classic 'I know this person'

label: Rue
content: Hey, I'm looking for someone ordering a ride...
???: That's me! Mia! Mia Scarlet?
The girl shouted and ran up to mee, before hiding behind me.
I looked at the group.

label: Rue
content: You got a problem?

label: Troll
content: Ugh, killjoy, piss off corpse breath
I flipped them off as they walked away.
Then I turned to the girl.

label: Rue
content: Friend of yours?

label: Mia
content: Y-yes... They're I mean NO! God no, I was just around...

label: Rue
content: What are you doing at this godless hour? Need a hitch a ride back home?

label: Mia
content: Uhh, ummm, yes... I mean, I was just, I... I fell asleep in there and now its...
The girl gestured at a nearby building. It's a library, with a nice park bench in front of it. Places where people read, usually when the sun is up.

label: Mia
content: But my phone battery died and I can't call a-

label: Rue
content: Alright, alright, geez... Hop on, where do you live?

label: Mia
content: Oh, thank you! It's umm.. Just go down this road...
I can feel Mia hopping on to the bike behind me and I started the engine once again.
I ride down the road with the small human girl clinging on to me like a lifeline. I could've sworn I've seen her somewhere but I can't seem to remember.

label: Mia
content: So ummm... What's your name?
Her voice was a little muffled behind my back. I can barely make it out.

label: Rue
content: Rue

label: Mia
content: Rue! Okay, okay... Oh, turn right here!
After a while, I finally made it to a small house at the outskirts of the city. There's a silhouette of a massive mansion nearby.
Mia hopped off my bike and walked up to the small house. She knocked on it.
???: Nyandayo...
???: Mia, it's 4 am in the morning what are you...
The person who stepped out is a young man, hair pulled in a pony tail, and a pair of cat-like ears on his head.

label: Mia
content: Mikalio nii san!
The girl lunged at Mikalio, hugging him.

label: Mikalio
content: The hell?
The man looked at me.

label: Mikalio
content: Who are you? Did she rope you into...

label: Mia
content: Ah! We should head inside it's super late! Thanks a lot Rue!

label: Mikalio
content: Chotto... Mia what the hell, hey don't just walk into my...
The door closed shut before I could say another word.
Strange girl... And something tells me this isn't really her home...
I took a quick shower the moment I get home.
Just rinse off the filth off me, put on whatever, and just lay flat on the bed.
I gazed at the ceiling, this shoebox apartment that I've called home for 10 years now...
Aren't vampires supposed to live in big mansions?

label: Rue
content: Haa...
And it's so hot and humid...
Look, I don't give a shit, I don't want much in life. But...
I really, really want to get out of this country. Somewhere darker, colder.
It's too hot and humid in this dumpster fire.

label: Rue
content: 100.000 blips
That's how much I need to save up to get out of here. It's... not much at all.
My salary at Pandora is 7000 blips monthly, that's 84.000 blips in 12 months if I don't eat or use it for anything.
Minus rent and utilities, I'll save up after 2  years of work. I just can't eat or buy gas.

label: Rue
content: Not that I need to eat...
I closed my eyes as the sun finally rose.
Yet another day in the store. Haa...
I was just finished handling a dwarf asking if the knife sold here is tempered steel and I said no. He bought it either way, saying something about worthy challenge.
The next customer...
Fuck it's her...

label: Mia
content: Oh! You work here?

label: Rue
content: Clearly.

label: Mia
content: Whoa! Okay, okay, umm... I, we haven't got a chance to talk and...

label: Rue
content: You're holding up the line

label: Mia
content: Oh, oh, sorry, I'll, okay, I'll go back when it's less crowded. Hey can I have your number??

label: Rue
content: Not now

label: Mia
content: Right, right...

label: Rue
content: Aren't you going to buy something?

label: Mia
content: Eh? Oh! Uhh... I'll have uhh... this!
She grabbed the chocolate bar on the counter, didn't even bother looking at it.
I scanned the item.

label: Rue
content: That'll be 200 blips

label: Mia
content: Okay, uhh, here...
I process her purchase.

label: Rue
content: Next!
It was 11PM, there's no customer... I sighed, getting ready to sit down and idle when the door rings open.

label: Mia
content: Hi again!
I rolled my eyes.

label: Rue
content: Welcome to Pandoramart, how can I help you?

label: Mia
content: Oh! Just buying some... stuff...
The girl walked down the aisle looking for something. She returned with some sticks of candle.
I scanned them without a word.

label: Rue
content: That'll be 150 blips, anything else

label: Mia
content: Wait, wait, wait, uhhh... We haven't had a chance to talk, and look, no line behind me!
Unfortunately...

label: Rue
content: What do  you want?

label: Mia
content: Well, I, I've always been curious, you're a vampire, right? Like the real deal???

label: Rue
content: Yea

label: Mia
content: Do you... drink blood?

label: Rue
content: If I can afford it

label: Mia
content: Are blood expensive?

label: Rue
content: Humans one yes, very expensive

label: Mia
content: Ummm... Uhh, weird question, but hypothetically... if like, someone offer you their blood, will you...

label: Rue
content: I will refuse, not worth the risk

label: Mia
content: Risk?
I sighed.

label: Rue
content: 150 Blips

label: Mia
content: Okay, okay geez... Here,
11 PM, and there she is...

label: Mia
content: Hi again!

label: Rue
content: Welcome to Pandoramart, how can I help you?

label: Mia
content: Moo... You're so cold...
The girl walked down the aisle and grabbed a bundle of thick rope.
I scanned the rope.

label: Rue
content: That'll be 400 Blips

label: Mia
content: Aren't you going to ask what it's for?

label: Rue
content: 400 Blips

label: Mia
content: What if I tell you I'm secretly depressed and I'm gonna hang myself with it?

label: Rue
content: Card or Cash?

label: Mia
content: Ugh... You're impossible... I just want to get to know you!
I sighed and looked around, it's 11 PM, no one is here. She's not holding up the line, and Nyarla is somewhere doing squid / eldritch thing.

label: Rue
content: Fine... Look, I'm not trying to attract attention, that time in alley it was... That's not what I do usually,

label: Mia
content: But you were so cool!

label: Rue
content: What the fuck do you want?

label: Mia
content: Umm, can I have your number? Also, I heard Vampires live for a long time? How old are you? A million years  old? Were you there when dinosaurs walk the land?
I sighed.

label: Rue
content: I was there during 4th Rapture

label: Mia
content: I KNEW IT!
The girl blurted out, then covered her mouth. She glanced around hastily.

label: Mia
content: I, I mean, that's so cool!
The door bell rings a customer walks in.

label: Rue
content: That's your cue, card or cash,
Mia fumbled through her bag and took out some cash.

label: Rue
content: Thank you for your purchase, have a nice day,
It was 5 minutes before 4 AM, the end of my shift.
Hmmm... Something's wrong...
Today was too peaceful...
The door rings open.

label: Mia
content: Hi again!
Nevermind...

label: Rue
content: Make it quick

label: Mia
content: Come on... I thought we had something going on between us!
I blinked, slowly, then turned to Nyarla

label: Rue
content: I'm clocking out

label: Nyarla
content: Etadru oyht iwnu fevah!
I stepped out of the pandoramart with the annoying girl clinging on to me.

label: Mia
content: Ne, ne, Rue, why do you work here? In this uhh... Convenience store?

label: Rue
content: Cuz job market is bullshit

label: Mia
content: Uhh... is it?

label: Rue
content: Do you work? Go to school?

label: Mia
content: No...
Mia averted her gaze and looked down.

label: Mia
content: I live alone, in a big mansion... I... I lied, Mikalio isn't my big bro, he's just... a neighbor. I had him pretend that...

label: Rue
content: I know, it's obvious

label: Mia
content: Eh?

label: Rue
content: Mm, anything else?

label: Mia
content: W-well, I live alone and... If possible I'd like you to... Keep me company? Sometime? This is umm... an invitation see? To the mansion?

label: Rue
content: I'll think about it.

label: Mia
content: Rue... Do you hate me? Is there anything I can do to make you... not hate me?

label: Rue
content: I don't hate you
Mia's eyes widened, her lips  parted as she gazed up at me.

label: Mia
content: You don't? But... you keep...

label: Rue
content: I was on my shift, you're bothering me during my work.
A blush formed on her face.

label: Mia
content: Y-you mean...

label: Rue
content: Yes, next time, come visit me after I clock out.
The girl looked down and clenched her fist.

label: Mia
content: Y-you... You didn't tell me! I thought, I thought you hate me and you keep pushing me away and... And I know I'm being creepy, but, but , but I was so, so scared that you hate me and...
I put a hand over her head, gently patting it.

label: Rue
content: No, you're annoying brat, yes, but I don't hate you
Mia's lips quivered and she folded her arms.

label: Mia
content: W-well, I hate you now! For, for playing with my poor maiden heart!!!

label: Rue
content: That's a shame
I stood up and head for my bike.

label: Mia
content: WAIT WAIT WAIT I WAS JUST JOKING!!!
The girl grabbed my hand, clutching it hard.

label: Rue
content: You're giving me mixed messages

label: Mia
content: YOU'RE MIXED MESSAGES!!!!
I sighed and turned back to Mia.

label: Rue
content: What do you want?

label: Mia
content: I... I want a friend and... mansion, do you... do you wanna come? Visit me?
I sighed.

label: Rue
content: I don't have a mansion to give you

label: Mia
content: THAT'S NOT- Don't... Ahhh, you're teasing me! You know what I meant!!!
I smirked a little

label: Rue
content: Then, what do you mean?

label: Mia
content: I just like... I just want a cool friend like you and...
I shrugged and turned to the direction of the big mansion.

label: Rue
content: You need a ride home then?
The girl beamed.

label: Mia
content: Oh my gosh yes!!!
I arrived in front of the mansion, it's massive, looks a bit like a castle. Yknow, where you'd expect a vampire would live in?

label: Mia
content: We're here!
The girl twirled a little, gesturing at the mansion.

label: Mia
content: This is my home, you can visit anytime!

label: Rue
content: Cool
I gave her a thumbs up and started my motorbike.

label: Mia
content: WAIT!
The girl ran back towards me.

label: Mia
content: You can't just leave! We just got here! At least, at least let me show you my room!

label: Rue
content: It's Thursday 6 AM, I don't want to destroy the only thing I have left in life.
Mia's eyes widened and she stepped closer towards me.

label: Mia
content: The only thing on you have left in life? Wh-what is it? I mean... If you're ready to telll me but...

label: Rue
content: A normal circadian rhythm
Mia paused frozen, then pouted

label: Mia
content: Stop teasing me!
I turned on the engine

label: Rue
content: Wasn't trying to, see ya
It's finally weekend.
I decided to keep my promise, I'm not a monster. I stood by my words.
(Also because us vampires can be bound by promise, but Mia must *never* know that)

label: Rue
content: Hmm...
I stood in front of the mansion, I tried entering, I tried pressing my hand against the gate.
Some invisible barrier stopped me from even touching the gate.
Right, I can't go into places without invitation.

label: Rue
content: Mia? Mia!
I tapped my foot, wait for a very long time (20 seconds) and decided that she must be busy and cancelled this whole thing, so I can just turn around and leave.
I started my bike and about to rode off when a shrill voice caught my attention.

label: Mia
content: WAIT!!! WAIT RUE! I'M SO SORRY I OVERSLEPT WAIIT!!!!!
I rolled my eyes, dammit, she actually woke up.
I turned off my bike and watched as the girl scrambled to open the gates.

label: Mia
content: Please! please, come on in! Make...
The girl gasped, as if she just down 5 flights of stairs.

label: Mia
content: yourself... at home... ha...

label: Rue
content: Thanks, you mind if I park my bike inside?

label: Mia
content: Y-yeah, you can park in the front yard... it's... not used...
I parked the bike and watched as Mia finally managed to catch her breath.

label: Mia
content: Okay, okay, so...
The girl bowed deeply.

label: Mia
content: Thank you so much for visiting me Rue!!!
I sighed.

label: Rue
content: Right, can I go now?

label: Mia
content: NO!
The girl grabbed my arm.

label: Mia
content: Come on, come on, let me show you around the mansion!!!
I followed the girl through the front door and into the mansion.
It's massive, it has long history, and it reeks holy magic. By the devils above I hate this place.

label: Mia
content: And here's the main... Umm... Big room!

I stood in the middle of the grand hall. Large carpeted hallway, pristine and beautiful, with chandeliers glowing above, double door, stained glass, suits of armor. You know, shit people gets paid to draw.
Not that I can afford it.

label: Mia
content: What do you think???

label: Rue
content: Decent

label: Mia
content: Oh you haven't seen the best parts!!!
The girl led me up the grand staircase, walls depicting painting and murals of  old war decorated everything.
God, the embellishments...
Don't read, don't read, don't read...

label: Rue
content: FUCK!

label: Mia
content: What?
The girl froze and turned to me.

label: Mia
content: Wh-what's wrong???

label: Rue
content: Sorry, just... the egregious amount of bullshit depicted in this walls, makes me want to murder you.

label: Mia
content: Me?

label: Rue
content: You're the closest human here...
I pointed at a tapestry.

label: Rue
content: Look... Lucifer didn't 'Call Upon The Creatures of Dark to Lay Siege Upon The Light', he was holding an advertising campaign

label: Mia
content: Advertising Campaign?

label: Rue
content: YES!!! He's trying to get more people to go to hell, because with God gone, he can stop torturing people. Hell becomes a business, there's no eternal punishment. It's just a very, very shitty place to live, and he wants to make it a nicer place to live.

label: Mia
content: Whoa... so... if I die and go to hell...

label: Rue
content: You'll get power, a property, depending on your sin. If you're just a fucking normie, you become someone else's property. So it's safer bet to go to heaven.

label: Mia
content: So you should either go all in on Sin or go all in on Virtue, is that it?

label: Rue
content: Bingo!

label: Mia
content: But I thought God decide what's sinful and what virtuous?
We continue walking, talking about heaven and hell.

label: Rue
content: That's the bullcrap, the angels did a counter marketing. They get exterminators to fight of the campaign and Lucifer recruited us, creatures of the dark, to protect the adverts and billboards. We lost, badly, and then the angels ran disiniformation champaign and no one knows how to get a good life in Hell.
I groaned, the memories of a few hundred years ago came to me.

label: Rue
content: Basically, Lucifer operates on certain law. Your sin manifests as power in hell, and like, if you only prey on the weak, then well, you're fucked. Because there's not much 'weakling' in hell, yhear? Serial Killers, Billionaires, and Dictators gets the best out of hell. Pedos, Petty Thief, and Bullies get to be their lackies, you get me???

label: Mia
content: Whoa... I didn't know you're so passionate about this...

label: Rue
content: No, no I don't, I just hate that I have to remember it...
Soon enough we made it to a massive dining room.

label: Mia
content: Here we are! The dining room!
There was a feast atop the table, roasted turkey, steaks, potatoes, vegetables, pasta, and more. It's the kind of feast prepared for a very rich, very powerful people.

label: Rue
content: Huh...
I blinked and found traces of house keeping magic, then I glanced at the utensils.

label: Mia
content: It just appeared when I'm not looking, the food I mean...
The girl sat on the dining room.

label: Mia
content: The food will disappear and the dish will clean itself after I finish eating. The fridge is always stocked.

label: Rue
content: Hee...
I sat down facing her on the dining table. I helped myself on the rarest cut of steak.

label: Mia
content: You can come here everyday! We can have breakfast, lunch, and dinner together.
I zoned out of her rambling and took a bite. It's juicy, but still too cooked for my liking.

label: Rue
content: Uhuh...
I chewed slowly, savoring it, wondering if this thing was ever a cow in its past life.

label: Mia
content: Do you like it?

label: Rue
content: Decent

label: Mia
content: Umm... What about the mansion? Do you feel welcome here? Would you like to spend more time in this place?
I looked at her.

label: Rue
content: I'd rather not, let's meet somewhere else

label: Mia
content: Why?

label: Rue
content: This place hates me
I took another bite

label: Rue
content: You can't feel it, but this building wants me gone

label: Mia
content: Hee? Why? It's just a magic building.
I rolled my eyes.

label: Rue
content: Magic requires life as a proxy, all things magical are alive, or...
I narrowed my eyes.

label: Rue
content: Wait, uhh, all things alive are magic, so since this is magic, it's most likely alive.

label: Mia
content: Oooh...
The girl stood up.

label: Mia
content: Mr. Mansion! Please be nice to my new friend!!! She's going to live here with me for as long as I live!
Nothing happens

label: Rue
content: It's not that easy.

label: Mia
content: How do we get rid of the magic?

label: Rue
content: You kill it, but then it'll turn into a regular building and you have to deal with bullshit like chores, cooking, and plumbing.

label: Mia
content: Mmm... What if you... kill it and sell it?

label: Rue
content: What??

label: Mia
content: Yeah! You can, you can kill this mansion, then you can sell it and keep the money! You can use it to do whatever you want.

label: Rue
content: Me? Wait, Mia, shut up, shut up for a moment

label: Mia
content: I mean, it's yours now, I've decided, I don't want this place. Or money. Or anything. Come on, let's kill it...
Killing intent seeps out of the walls and I face palmed.

label: Rue
content: Goddammit you idiot...
A goblet of clear water appeared next to me. Holy water, lethal to vampires like me.

label: Rue
content: I should leave

label: Mia
content: Ah wait, are you sure? Shouldn't we...
I jumped back, dodging a knife flying right at my face.

label: Rue
content: Yeah, apologize to the mansion, and uhh... Remember your neighbor? Mali?

label: Mia
content: Oh? Umm, yes?

label: Rue
content: Go live with him for a bit, this place wants us dead.

label: Mia
content: What do you...
I lunged at her and pulled away just in time as the chandelier dropped right where she was.
CRASH

label: Rue
content: Tch, brace yourself
I carried her bridal style and blitzed through the hallway.
The chandeliers dropped around us. The carpet tried to grab my foot and the suits of armor wave their sword.

label: Mia
content: Aaaaa!
The girl squealed, not scared squeal, but very excited and having the time of her life squeal.

label: Mia
content: It's chasing us! The suits of armor! I knew it can move! Ahahaha!

label: Rue
content: Shut up...
I jumped off the hall way and straight to the main grand hall and blitzed straight at the locked entrance.
Wood splinters and wall cracks as I kicked at the door with all my might. The door exploded outwards revealing the closed off gates.
I ran straight at the gate as numerous thorny vines tried to block us off.
I jumped up in the air, high, as high as I can muster and landed right in front of the mansion entrance.

label: Mia
content: Whoa... Kyah!
I dropped the girl on the ground in front of me.

label: Rue
content: Ugh... Well, at least I don't have to...
I froze.

label: Rue
content: MY BIKE!
I looked back at the mansion, right there, I can see it, my motorbike being swallowed by the earth inside the front yard. There was a certain gentleness in the way my bike was swallowed.
As if the mansion wants me to know that my bike is intact.
I clenched my fist.

label: Rue
content: Your house took my bike hostage.

label: Mia
content: Umm...
I looked at Mia

choice.label: main_mansion_exit_b
choice.display: Kill yourself, I don't want to see you ever again

choice.label: main_mansion_exit_c
choice.display: *punch her in the face and call her out for being an idiot*

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Nyarla
content: Oh hi!

label: Nyarla
content: Sorry for all the hello worlds

label: Nyarla
content: Shameless self insert aside, that's... that's all of it, the demo I mean

label: Nyarla
content: This has been the Act 1 and Act 2 of the Blood Slave Rapture

label: Nyarla
content: The story was made for the Toxic Yuri Gamejam, hence... Yknow, the... Uhhh... Yeah...

label: Nyarla
content: Anyway! If you're reading this,  you're playing the Demo / Ebiten version of Blood Slave Rapture

label: Nyarla
content: And I wanna talk about the uhh, technical part of this whole mess

label: Nyarla
content: See, the story you read was actually built using the Hikarin FSM

label: Nyarla
content: Hikarin Framework compiles the story, variables and branching paths and all... Into pure Json FSM

label: Nyarla
content: In a nutshell, instead of compiling story into a playable format, it simply turns the game into Machine Readable Format

label: Nyarla
content: After that it's only a matter of creating the runtime engine and rendering of logic in Ebiten

label: Nyarla
content: So yes! I've decouple the actuality content of the visual novel with the runtime engine, humu humu~

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Player
content: Hello World!

label: Rue
content: Nothing, I want you gone
Mia said nothing at first she just gazed at me, unreadable expression on her face.
Then she looked down a full body shudder shook her body.

label: Mia
content: Y-yeah... but...
The girl clenched her fist.

label: Mia
content: What if... I change for you? What if... What if I'm not Mia, would you still hate me?

label: Rue
content: No, because I don't like humans, or people in general. Please get out of my life.

label: Mia
content: Don't say that.. Please...

label: Rue
content: Or kill yourself, but don't involve me
The girl's breath hitched and I sighed in slight frustration.

label: Rue
content: Is there anything I can say so that I don't have to see you again?
Mia shook her head.

label: Rue
content: You're just gonna keep chasing after me? Why?

label: Mia
content: You can kill me... Then I won't bother you anymore...
The girl looked up at me again.

label: Mia
content: I don't like living, it hurts, being alive hurts, I... I'm not joking, I want to die and now the reason I'm alive....
Mia shuddered her voice cracking

label: Mia
content: I... I can't live with this, please... Just... please... give me a chance.

label: Rue
content: No
I stood up.

label: Mia
content: Just one more week!!!
The girl gripped my arm, clutching it tight.

label: Mia
content: Spend... spend time,  with me, for one week in the mansion... Visit, just an hour everyday, and I promise you, I'll kill myself, you can have my mansion, you can... you can do whatever you want to my body. Then that's it. I will be gone from your life, you won't see me, ever again...
I paused and turned to her. Hmm... If she keep her promise, I can focus on my job after one week.

label: Rue
content: If you chicken out at the end of the week, I will kill you myself, got it?

label: Mia
content: Y-yes! Thank you... Thank you!
I arrived in front of the mansion, it's massive, looks a bit like a castle. So this brat is actually very rich huh?
Hmm... I mean hey, beats the shoebox I live in, new house after she offed herself, good deal I say.

label: Mia
content: Here we are...
The girl was trembling a little as she slowly get off my bike.
Shell gestured at the mansion and forced a cheerful smile.

label: Mia
content: H-here we are!
I raised an eyebrow.

label: Rue
content: Mm, not bad...

label: Mia
content: Would you like to explore?
I head back to my bike.

label: Rue
content: Absolutely not
The girl flinched.

label: Mia
content: H-hey, if you don't get in mansion it doesn't count.
I rolled my eyes.

label: Rue
content: It's 6 AM and I care a lot about my sleep. I'll be back this weekend

label: Mia
content: But... That's just two days!
I paused and looked up. She makes a good point, she wants me to visit her for a week that's seven days.
I'm not gonna cheat her, what am I, the devil?

label: Rue
content: Guess you'll have to stay alive for the next month then

label: Mia
content: Ah, umm, okay, but... But promise me you visit at weekend!

label: Rue
content: Sure... Just don't bother me again at work.

label: Rue
content: Yes, I want to hurt you
Mia froze and looked up at me with wide eyes.

label: Rue
content: I want to tear you apart and hear you scream. I want to hear you beg for god to save you. I want to break you until there's nothing left.
I stood up, turned towards her, and grabbed her throat.

label: Rue
content: It's fucking illegal, yknow?? Murder? Hurting?
I squeezed and a keening gasp slid out of her throat, but I didn't let go.

label: Rue
content: It's unfair, a monster like me, forced to live like some civilized people...
I tossed her to the pavement.

label: Mia
content: Guh! Haa! Haaa... Haa...
The girl gasped for breath, holding her throat.
I kicked her casually making her whimper.

label: Rue
content: And then you came along... A fucking human... With all your clinginess, persistence...
I crouched down in front of her.

label: Rue
content: I feel like a caged animal in a zoo, starving... And there's you, a little girl, jeering and pointing from behind the glass...

label: Mia
content: I-I'm so-AAAAAAAH!!!
I stomped on her leg crushing it.

label: Mia
content: Aaaaaah!  Haaaa! Don't I... I need to...

label: Rue
content: Thought you're into this???
I kicked her like a ragdoll, sending her and blood all over the parking lot.

label: Rue
content: Talk to me again, and I will kill you
Mia coughed and scrambled a little, taking a look at her leg.

label: Mia
content: W-wait... I.. I need this...

label: Rue
content: What?

label: Mia
content: My legs, just... just in case... just in case I have to... chase after you again...

label: Rue
content: Why? So you I can break you again?

label: Mia
content: N-no, I mean, yes, I mean... Do you, do you hate me less now...?

label: Rue
content: Maybe

label: Mia
content: Then... then... come visit me? You can... hurt me, anytime you like, like this... Just... promise you visit me... a lot...
I rolled my eyes.

label: Rue
content: Fine...
A weak smile appeared on Mia's face.

label: Mia
content: Thank you... Ahh... I need to... get back though...
I looked at her shattered leg then walked up to my bike.

label: Rue
content: Hop on, I'll take you to the nearest hospital

label: Mia
content: I prefer healer in temple... Doctors are scary

label: Rue
content: I will break your other leg if you consider that again...

label: Mia
content: O-okay... okay... Doctor then...
I leaned on to the utility pole, arms folded looking at the hospital building.
It's white... It's sickeningly bright, but thank the devils above it does not have sculpture or statues or other bullshit in it.
Also it doesn't blast me away when I get close.

label: Mia
content: Rue!
The annoying brat waved her hand as she ran up towards me. She's... Fully healed? No sign of injury? No casket?
Huh...

label: Rue
content: Oi, how are you healed so fast?

label: Mia
content: Oh there was a cleric nearby who... Ghuk!
My fist punched her gut on reflex, cutting off her air and sent her on to her knees.

label: Rue
content: Sorry, force of habit
I helped her up.

label: Rue
content: You want a ride home?
The girl gave me a weak smile.

label: Mia
content: Y-yeah, thanks...
After a short trek, I finally made it in front of the mansion.
Hmmm... I feel like I recognize this place...
But where???

label: Mia
content: Here we are!
The girl twirled a little as she gestured at the mansion behind her.

label: Mia
content: Home sweet home... Well, kinda, I live here alone see? And the mansion takes care of me!

label: Rue
content: Hee...
I started the engine

label: Mia
content: W-wait! Where are you going?

label: Rue
content: Home

label: Mia
content: WAIT! Wait, wait, wait, don't  just... don't just go! I thought you hate me less now?
I rolled my eyes

label: Rue
content: Look, Mia, as much as I... well, I can't say I want to, but even if I say I will visit you, it's 6 AM, the sun is peeking out, and I don't want to ruin the one thing I have left in the world.

label: Mia
content: The one thing you have left?
The girl stepped closer to me, tentatively.

label: Mia
content: Something... precious?

label: Rue
content: Yes, very precious, very important, very fragile, I took extra care to take care of it.

label: Mia
content: Wh-what is it? I-I mean if you don't want me to pry or... Or... Umm, I mean, if you want to... share?

label: Rue
content: A working circadian cycle, anyway, I'll visit you weekend if I got time
I rode off, the engine drowns out Mia's indignant cries behind me.
Well, such is the cruel and uncaring world. Why should I involve myself?
I continue looking at the red light, waiting for it to go green.
???: Catch that brat!
I shook my head, ignoring the screams, when the world suddenly tilted.
A human girl, a human man, a troll, and a wolf kin crashed on to my bike sending us all tumbling on the the asphalt.
I scrambled on to my feet to check on the bike. There were scratches all over and the rearview mirror is broken.
I glared at the offending group, a blood red sword materialized in your grip.
The three trouble maker's face turned ashen, but the girl.. The girl just gazed at me with wide eyes.
I watched as the other three fled into the night, leaving you with just the girl.

label: Girl
content: Th-thank you! Umm... My name's Mia and...
I tried turning on your bike, it whines pathetically.

label: Rue
content: Mia huh... What are you up to at this godless hour?

label: Mia
content: W-well.... I was in the library, I fell asleep in the outdoor reading area and... It's night. And my phone battery died...

label: Rue
content: Right...
I continue trying to start your bike and it's finally rumbling.

label: Rue
content: Finally...
I hopped on to the bike and I can feel Mia hopped on to the seat behind me.
I don't remember inviting this brat.

label: Mia
content: Oh, right, umm... You can drop me off on the nearest bus stop, I can manage, it's okay!
There are no bus at this hour, she'll have to wait two more hours before anything can pick her up.
Should I help her? She smells like trouble, and I don't give a shit about her..

label: Rue
content: Fine... I'll give you a ride home kid, where do you live?

label: Mia
content: Oh! Umm, thank you! It's, it's not far from here I swear!
I rolled my eyes and ride down the road with the human girl sitting behind me. She clutched on to me carefully, as if afraid of offending me even more.

label: Mia
content: So ummm... What's your name?
Her voice was a little muffled behind my back. I can barely make it out.

label: Rue
content: Rue

label: Mia
content: Rue! Okay, okay... Oh, turn right here!
After a while, I finally made it to a small house at the outskirts of the city. There's a silhouette of a massive mansion nearby.
Mia hopped off and walked up to the small house. She knocked on it.
???: Nyandayo...
???: Mia, it's 4 am in the morning what are you...
The person who stepped out is a young man, hair pulled in a pony tail, and a pair of cat-like ears on his head.

label: Mia
content: Mikalio nii san!
The girl lunged at Mikalio, hugging him.

label: Mikalio
content: The hell?
The man looked at me.

label: Mikalio
content: Who are you? Did she rope you into...

label: Mia
content: Ah! We should head inside it's super late! Thanks a lot Rue!

label: Mikalio
content: Wait... Mia what the hell, hey don't just walk into my...
The door closed shut before I could say another word.
Strange girl... And something tells me this isn't really her home...
Ahh... Let's see...
Personally, I don't give a shit about saving a damsel in distress. But fuck me, I need to destress and well...
I parked my bike near the side walk and stepped out. A blood red sword materialized in my grip. I don't show up on CCTV anyway, so...
Yeah...

label: Rue
content: Hey...
The group turned towards us.

label: Troll
content: Ha? What's this bitch doing...

label: Wolf
content: Wait, wait, that looks like.

label: Human
content: VAMPIRE!!!
Ah, they changed their tune fast once they know what I am...
I blitzed in front of the troll who already let go of the girl.

label: Rue
content: Nothing personal...
I stabbed his ankle, sending him to his knee.

label: Troll
content: Gwaaaah! You bit-
I use my left hand to grab his massive shoulder, then just squeezed, hard, twisting it. I can feel him struggling, screaming at the heavens until finally.
'CRACK'
Blood and gore sprayed as I wrenched out his arm like fucking lego. Then I turned to all the others who started running.

I grabbed the screaming ogre by the head, a fountain of blood burst forth, and throw the head like a projectile towards the fleeing Wolf-man. The head hits his back with a crack, sending him tumbling forward, paralyzed.
Then I blitzed in front of the human.

label: Human
content: No, no, no, mercy, mercy, please!

I grabbed his finger then snapped it, one by one. He tried to run away, but I kicked his shin, crippling him. Then I spend some time snapping his fingers one by one, enjoying his screams as he begged for death.
After a while his voice become too hoarse and stabbed him in non-vital organ so that he'll bleed out.

Then finally I walked up towards the wolf man lying next to the head. His eyes are full of fear, his body paralyzed. I grabbed him by the neck, hung him to the wall with one hand and start skinning him alive with another.
After a while, he died of blood loss and I tossed their corpses in a pile.
Oh fuck that's totally illegal...
I face palmed.

label: Rue
content: Ugh... Rue, you goddamn, fucking idiot...
I turned to the girl that I 'saved' finding  her...
Still there, not screaming, not crying, just... stare at me with wide eyes...
And her hand on her crotch, which she quickly pulled up the moment my gaze  landed on her.

label: Mia
content: Ngh, oh oh ah.. um. uhh... Th-thank you for saving me... You uhh, I...

label: Rue
content: Sorry for the mess kid...

label: Mia
content: IT'S FINE!!! I mean, I mean...Umm.. we should get out of here before the angels showed up???

label: Rue
content: We?

label: Mia
content: Ah, I mean, umm, my home is a bit far away from here and I... I kinda... hope you'd be willing to give me a ride home...
I looked down on my blood soaked clothes and body then back at Mia.

label: Rue
content: You sure about that?

label: Mia
content: YES! I mean, I mean, umm... I don't mind!!!

label: Rue
content: Alright, hop on...
I hopped on to my trusty bike and she sat right behind me, breathing heavily.
The night city air helped with drying up the blood all over me, just barely. I can feel Mia clinging on to me, pressing her face against  me despite I'm covered in blood.

label: Mia
content: S-so... what's your name?

label: Rue
content: Rue

label: Mia
content: Ah, umm... My name is Mia... nice to meet you...

label: Rue
content: Mia huh...

label: Mia
content: Oh, right turn over there... Near that spooky mansion...
The girl led me to a simple house near a large mansion. She hopped off the bike and knocked on the door.
???: Nyandayo...
The door  opened, revealing a boy with a pony tail and a pair of cat-like ears. He glanced at me, then at Mia, then sighed.

label: Mia
content: Mikalio nii-chan!

label: Mikalio
content: No
The boy closed the door shut in front of us.

label: Mia
content: Ah wait, please! Let me stay here for... I mean, don't ground me! These are just... Ketchup! yes! Not real blood!!!
Mia banged on the door.

label: Mia
content: I'll pay you triple!!!
The door opened and Mikalio steps out.

label: Mikalio
content: For real?

label: Mia
content: YES!
Mikalio turned to me then back to Mia.

label: Mikalio
content: Thank you for... Helping my... What are you supposed to be again?

label: Mia
content: Sister!

label: Mikalio
content: Right, my 'sister', fuckin' hell, just... just get in you brat...
I watched as the two entered the house, leaving me alone, blood drenched.

label: Karen
content: FOR DAYS I LEFT THIS BREAD IN

label: Rue
content: Manager!
The squid person pops up behind me.

label: Nyarla
content: You rang? Oh! Hello, how can I help you?

label: Karen
content: Are you the manager?

label: Nyarla
content: At your service~

label: Karen
content: Well, listen, I just put this bread on the counter and LOOK AT IT
The perfectly normal slice of bread lay on the counter. The manager touched it with his finger.

label: Nyarla
content: It's a bit dry...

label: Karen
content: No! It's not moldy! There's no sign of mold or rot, it's like nature itself refuses to claim this bread!

label: Nyarla
content: You know humidity plays a role in-

label: Karen
content: I WANT MY MONEY BACK AND DEMAND A PROPER COMPENSATION!
The manager blinked, though his laid back grin never disappear

label: Nyarla
content: Okay, okay... Let's talk more, I have a room in the back.
You watched as the manager led the woman to the door in the back. The one that led to the office at...
Wait no, that's the other door? Wait, huh? Since when are there two doors here? Wait huh?
I watched as the two disappeared into the door. A strange mahogany door that looked out of place in this convenience store. I tried opening the door, but it's locked shut.
After a while the door opened and the manager stepped out, the woman nowhere to be seen.

label: Rue
content: Wait where is she?

label: Nyarla
content: Where is who?

label: Rue
content: The woman? The elf?

label: Nyarla
content: Hmm? Could've sworn she was an arachnid.
You blinked and looked back at the doors.
But... The mahogany door is nowhere to be seen.
A grin suddenly formed on Nyarla's face.

label: Nyarla
content: I'm just messin' with ya!
A tentacle pat your back.

label: Nyarla
content: Don't worry the karen is handled, you don't have to worry about her anymore.

label: Rue
content: What do you mean handled her?

label: Nyarla
content: Hmm? Why do you suddenly care so much about her? You asked me to handle her, it's too late to change your mind~

label: Rue
content: Uhh... Wait...

label: Nyarla
content: I got stuff to do, see ya, give me a holler if you need anything.

label: Karen
content: FOR DAYS I LEFT THIS BREAD ON THE COUNTER AND YET!
What was that quote again? The one from the ballad about some greek hero?
Ruthlessness Was Mercy Upon Ourselves... Right, that one...
Time to show myself mercy then...

label: Karen
content: And for this I dema-
The Karen's words were cut short. A drop of blood drip down her neck. My hand was inches away from hers, dagger-like nail scraped a soft skin.
I found my entire body paralyzed. Numerous tentacles coiled around my arm, stopping me in cable-like grip. No matter how much I try the Tentacle didn't budge an inch.

label: Nyarla
content: Whoa hey, Rue, come on now, don't kill the customer it's bad for business!

label: Karen
content: You... YOU DISEASED MANIAC!
The Karen turned wildly towards Nyarla.

label: Karen
content: And you! You're the manager aren't you?! How can you let this... MONSTER-

label: Aster
content: Let's take this somewhere more comfortable. Come on, I have a room in the back.
I watched as the manager led her to a staircase that led downstairs. The stairs are dark polished obsidian and even though I can see perfect in the dark, I can't really make out the bottom.
Now that I think about it, I don't remember there's ever any stairs in this store.
After a while, the manager returns with the woman. I'm not sure what happened but there's this haunted look on her face.
The woman who stepped out is an entirely different person. Her gaze look around in fear, she trembles, her body language a mess, and she stumbled in her steps.

label: Nyarla
content: Well now, is there anything else?

label: Karen
content: N-no! No! I'm sorry please forgive this one, please no more, no more, please, I was wrong I'll do anything let me go, please, please just....

label: Nyarla
content: Alright you are free to leave~
I watched as the woman bolted out the store, stumbled and fell hard on the pavement before running away again.
Then a truck came barreling in and hit her.
She's dead now.

label: Nyarla
content: Oooh, rest in peace...
I blinked.

label: Rue
content: What did you do?

label: Nyarla
content: Torture, magic torture, make it feel like she suffer for years in the span of minutes.

label: Rue
content: Seriously?

label: Nyarla
content: That's what you wanted no? You tried to kill her, you hate her, you want something bad to happen to her.
The manager pointed a tentacle at the cctv camera.

label: Nyarla
content: But we can't really do that where forensic angel unit can make investigation, so...

label: Rue
content: Right... okay...

label: Nyarla
content: Anyway, I got work to do, give me a holler if you need anything!
